text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby, where the<n>rising stars of the
age gather to<n>compete. Of course, the worthy foe
who challenged me for the Satsuki<n>crown is in
attendance.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
With one look at the fire in her eyes, I<n>sense a
potential ally in my quest to<n>overthrow the Golden
Generation.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Very well! I shall see if that fighting<n>spirit is
genuine!
